message:
So, the other night, I was in the kitchen whipping up my famous spaghetti sauce (or at least, that’s what I like to think!). My partner was on the couch, engrossed in a show. Suddenly, I caught a whiff of something... not quite right. Turns out, I’d left a wooden spoon resting too close to the burner. Yikes! 

In that moment, I felt that little twinge of ‘I told you so’ when I remembered our recent fire safety discussion. We had just gone through our escape plan and checked the smoke alarms. It was a good reminder that sometimes, the mundane routines can save us from our own kitchen blunders. 

After a quick laugh and a minor rescue of the spoon, it reminded me how important it is to stay prepared. A little refresher on kitchen safety tips never hurts, right? What’s your go-to kitchen safety tip?
